# `keypressed`

**Systems:** ATARI520ST  
**Parameters:** `b`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>Keypressed( [byte] );</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[byte] - key to test</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Tests whether the key specified in parameter 1 is presser or not. Returns 1 if true, 0 if not.</p>
<p>See CONSTANTS section in help for a list of KEY_ values available to use.</p>

<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
 if ( keypressed( KEY_R ) = 1 ) then ...
</code>


</div>
